mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO login_user (id, name, username, password, phone, sex, id_number, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.name}, #{item.username}, #{item.password}, #{item.phone}, #{item.sex}, #{item.idNumber}, #{item.status}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.createUser}, #{item.updateUser})

update.foreach: UPDATE login_user SET name = #{item.name}, username = #{item.username}, password = #{item.password}, phone = #{item.phone}, sex = #{item.sex}, id_number = #{item.idNumber}, status = #{item.status}, update_time = #{item.updateTime}, update_user = #{item.updateUser} WHERE id = #{item.id}

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO login_user (id, name, username, password, phone, sex, id_number, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{sex}, #{idNumber}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = #{name}, username = #{username}, password = #{password}, phone = #{phone}, sex = #{sex}, id_number = #{idNumber}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser}

INSERT INTO login_user
id, name, username, password, phone, sex, id_number, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user,
VALUES
#{id}, #{name}, #{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{sex}, #{idNumber}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser},
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = #{name}, username = #{username}, password = #{password}, phone = #{phone}, sex = #{sex}, id_number = #{idNumber}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser},
